subject: A sunlit Mediterranean-style grove of cypress and olive trees on rolling hills, with a winding earthen path leading toward distant pale hills under a soft blue sky
description: A pastoral landscape painting depicting a grove of dark green cypress trees and rounded olive-like canopies clustered on rolling hills. A pale, dusty path winds through the center of the scene, leading the eye toward softer, hazier hills in the distance. Warm afternoon sunlight filters through the foliage, casting dappled shadows on the foreground earth. The palette is dominated by deep forest greens, warm ochres, and soft sky blues. There are no figures or creatures visible. The overall feel is serene, sun-drenched, and distinctly Mediterranean — fitting the Theros Greek-myth-inspired plane.
foreground: earthen path, exposed soil, low grasses, base of cypress trunks
background: rolling hills, distant pale ridges, hazy sky, clusters of trees
